message:
feat(core): runtime abstraction layer for asupersync migration

Add a runtime indirection layer across frankenterm-core so the crate can
be built against either tokio or asupersync without per-file changes.

Cargo.toml:
- Add futures workspace dep for FuturesUnordered
- Remove unused fastapi-core dep, simplify web feature to [fastapi, asupersync]

snapshot_engine.rs:
- New spawn_blocking_db() helper dispatches to asupersync::runtime::spawn_blocking
  or tokio::task::spawn_blocking based on feature flag
- spawn_blocking_db_best_effort() wrapper with Default fallback
- Replaces inline tokio::task::spawn_blocking calls throughout the engine

tailer.rs:
- Replace JoinSet<(u64, PollOutcome)> with TailerPollTaskSet backed by
  FuturesUnordered<JoinHandle<_>> for runtime-agnostic task collection
- Import futures::StreamExt for .next() on the unordered set
- PollTaskSet trait now implemented on the new wrapper type

mcp.rs:
- Add run_stdio_server() entry point that creates the MCP server and stdio
  transport internally, so callers don't need a direct fastmcp dependency

pool.rs, runtime.rs, runtime_compat.rs, spsc_ring_buffer.rs,
vendored/mux_pool.rs, search_bridge.rs, survival.rs, telemetry.rs:
- Adjust imports and call sites for runtime_compat abstractions

proptest_runtime_compat.rs:
- Remove trailing blank line

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -21,6 +21,7 @@ tokio.workspace = true
 thiserror.workspace = true
 tracing.workspace = true
 tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
+futures.workspace = true
 
 # Pattern matching
 aho-corasick.workspace = true
@@ -69,7 +70,6 @@ fastmcp = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 toon_rust = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 # Web server (optional, behind feature)
 fastapi = { workspace = true, optional = true }
-fastapi-core = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 # Sync (optional, behind feature)
 asupersync = { workspace = true, optional = true, features = ["tls"] }
 # Distributed mode (optional, behind feature)
@@ -279,7 +279,7 @@ frankenterm = ["frankenterm-deps"]
 vendored = ["frankenterm"]  # backward compat alias
 browser = ["browser-automation"]
 mcp = ["mcp-server"]
-web = ["dep:fastapi", "dep:fastapi-core", "dep:asupersync"]
+web = ["dep:fastapi", "dep:asupersync"]
 streaming = ["web"]
 tui = ["dep:ratatui", "dep:crossterm"]
 ftui = ["dep:ftui"]
